title: Knysna gym launch raises spirits and funds
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna community came out...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna community came out in full force on Saturday 11 October to celebrate the grand opening of Enhanced Fitness Studio - and they did it in high-energy style.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna community came out in full force on Saturday 11 October to celebrate the grand opening of Enhanced Fitness Studio - and they did it in high-energy style."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The studio launched with a 24-hour fitness and fundraising event that combined movement, music and community spirit, all in support of Thando House Knysna, a local non-profit that provides care and support for vulnerable children."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The star of the event was local athlete Ryan Sletcher, who took on an awe-inspiring pull-up challenge in front of an enthusiastic crowd. Over the course of 18 hours, Sletcher completed a staggering 4 100 pull-ups - a feat of endurance and determination that captivated everyone watching.","html":"The star of the event was local athlete Ryan Sletcher, who took on an awe-inspiring pull-up challenge in front of an enthusiastic crowd. Over the course of 18 hours, Sletcher completed a staggering 4 100 pull-ups - a feat of endurance and determination that captivated everyone watching."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While not yet officially verified as a national or continental record, the achievement marks a major personal milestone and a proud moment for Knysna's fitness community.","html":"While not yet officially verified as a national or continental record, the achievement marks a major personal milestone and a proud moment for Knysna's fitness community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"But it wasn't all about pull-ups. The event featured team fitness relays, family-friendly challenges, and a kids' bouldering workshop, introducing young climbers to the joy of movement in a supportive environment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A local DJ kept energy levels high with music throughout the day, while the smell of fresh pancakes added a festive, family-friendly touch.","html":"A local DJ kept energy levels high with music throughout the day, while the smell of fresh pancakes added a festive, family-friendly touch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All proceeds from the event were donated to Thando House Knysna.","html":"All proceeds from the event were donated to Thando House Knysna."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Thanks to community participation and local sponsorships, the fundraiser was a resounding success,\" said Benjamin Lombard, owner of Enhanced Fitness Studio."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This event was about more than fitness - it was about people. We wanted our opening to reflect what we stand for: strength, friendship, and building a stronger Knysna\".","html":"\"This event was about more than fitness - it was about people. We wanted our opening to reflect what we stand for: strength, friendship, and building a stronger Knysna\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The achievement of completing 4 100 pull-ups over 18 hours marks a major personal milestone and a proud moment for Ryan Sletcher.","html":"The achievement of completing 4 100 pull-ups over 18 hours marks a major personal milestone and a proud moment for Ryan Sletcher."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Local athlete Ryan Sletcher completed a staggering 4 100 pull-ups over the course of 18 hours at the launch.","html":"Local athlete Ryan Sletcher completed a staggering 4 100 pull-ups over the course of 18 hours at the launch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
